title: Edge A5 Mint Green Notebook Soft Cover Twin Wire Notepad School Work Note Taking Journal
features: PREMIUM NOTE-TAKING: Experience the smooth feel of 100 sheets (200 pages) of premium A5 (148 x 210mm) 80gsm ruled paper, each featuring a blank date header for easy organization.
ORGANIZED & EFFICIENT: Perforated pages allow for clean and convenient removal of notes, keeping your work organized and shareable.
VERSATILE FUNCTIONALITY: This simple notebook can be used in a variety of ways; Note taking, workout journal, schoolwork, recipe planner or jotting down your thoughts, sketches and doodles
ECO CONSCIOUS CHOICE: This notebook is crafted with FSC certified paper, ensuring responsible forestry practices for a sustainable future.

STYLISH & PROTECTIVE: The trendy Mint Green cover adds a touch of personality while protecting your notes. An ideal gift for students of all ages, this notebook helps them stay organized and stylish throughout the school year.
description: Elevate your note-taking with this premium notebook! The soft cover offers comfortable writing, while 200 pages of smooth 80gsm paper provide ample space for all your ideas. Perforated pages allow for easy removal and organization. Perfect for note-taking, journaling, schoolwork, or brainstorming, this versatile notebook is a must-have for students or anyone who wants to stay organized in style.
